platformNote: App is live in production and available for direct testing. Plus supporting pages: companies, contacts, imports, settings, data management

data.title: Data Foundation
data.description: Get real data into the platform and fill in the gaps

items.name: DealCloud One-Way Sync
items.detail: Pull historical companies + contacts. Read first, zero risk. PRD written, API credentials received.

items.name: Waterfall Enrichment
items.detail: Auto-fill emails, phones, LinkedIn. Multiple providers in sequence - first match wins.

items.name: Unified Enrichment Layer
items.detail: Evaluating Clay as single integration covering ZoomInfo, PDL, Sales Intel. Discussion point.

data.footnote: Prerequisite: real data to enrich, score, and act on

outreach.title: Outreach Engine
outreach.description: Connect email, build templates, wire up multi-channel sequences

items.name: Email OAuth (Outlook + Google)
items.detail: Connect Outlook directly. Send + track opens, clicks, replies. Google OAuth added. Needs real-user testing.

items.name: Open/Click/Reply Tracking
items.detail: Pixel open tracking, link click tracking with HMAC, reply detection. Feeds engagement scores. Needs testing.

items.name: LinkedIn & Physical Mail
items.detail: LinkedIn prompts + Handwrytten/Sendoso become sequence steps. Platform orchestrates.

items.name: Post-Call Follow-Up Drafts
items.detail: Template category + AI scaffolding exists. Full flow needs call detection + automatic trigger.

outreach.footnote: Can run in parallel with Track A - no hard dependency

intelligence.title: Intelligence
intelligence.description: Make the system smarter over time - scaffolding starts early

items.name: Signal Detection
items.detail: Trigger management UI built (create, route, action). Automated detection from LinkedIn/news not yet connected.

items.name: AI-Assisted Recommendations
items.detail: Who to contact, which channel, relevant context. Coaching briefs before calls. Needs usage data first.

items.name: Sequence Optimization
items.detail: Track performance by cadence, channel, tier, timing. Target 20-30% connect rate uplift.

intelligence.footnote: Scaffolding starts now; full value needs usage data from A+B

builtCards.name: Scoring Engine
builtCards.detail: Multi-factor scoring: fit + engagement + priority. Recalculates daily.

builtCards.name: What's Next Dashboard
builtCards.detail: Priority-sorted daily action list with agenda summary. First screen of the day.

builtCards.name: Pipeline Board
builtCards.detail: Visual kanban, discovery through close. Swimlanes, sorting, filters. Configurable stages.

builtCards.name: Activity Timeline
builtCards.detail: Every touchpoint auto-logged. One chronological view per company.

builtCards.name: Sequence Engine
builtCards.detail: Multi-step cadences with channel mixing. Human-in-loop always.

builtCards.name: Tier-Based Playbooks
builtCards.detail: Tier 1 = high-touch. Tier 2/3 = volume. Prescriptive for junior reps.

builtCards.name: CSV Import
builtCards.detail: Complete CSV import with template, field mapping, duplicate handling, and edge case protection.

builtCards.name: Pipeline Swimlanes
builtCards.detail: Vertical grouping by theme/tier/stage with collapse/expand. Horizontal grouping + sorting by priority, recency.

builtCards.name: Data Management
builtCards.detail: Admin data management under Settings with tiered clear/reset scopes and confirmation safeguards.

builtCards.name: AI Drafts + Templates
builtCards.detail: Full template library with rich-text editor, variable substitution, AI draft generation, and version history.

toolLandscape.desc: Sourcing stays - API/CSV import replaces manual re-entry into DealCloud.
Stays for deal tracking + firm reporting. Sync replaces manual entry. Replacement is V3+.
Always stays - platform provides prompts, users execute outreach directly.
Sending engine under the hood. Platform drafts + tracks, user always hits send.
Gifting becomes a sequence step. Sendoso fulfills, platform orchestrates.
Handwritten letters become a sequence step. Same orchestration model as gifting.
Manual phone lookups (5-6 clicks per contact). Absorbed into unified enrichment layer.
Separate subscription for contact enrichment. Absorbed into unified enrichment layer.
Separate enrichment provider. Absorbed into unified enrichment layer.
Potential unified enrichment layer covering all three. Discussion point.
Part of market mapping research. Stays manual - requires human investigation.
Association databases, sourcing lists. Same rationale as Google Search.
Stays until signal detection provably covers everything it does and more.
Templates move into the platform - eliminating copy-paste workflow.

convergence.name: Bidirectional DealCloud Sync
convergence.detail: "Sync to DealCloud" at lead-in-touch stage. ~80% automatable. DealCloud stays for post-conversation deals + firm reporting.
convergence.requires: Track A + Track B live with real users

convergence.name: Replicable GTM Platform
convergence.detail: Standardized onboarding, shared learnings, leaner stack. Deploy across teams and portfolio companies.
convergence.requires: All tracks proven with real data

painPoints.text: Multiple disconnected tools with manual work bridging every handoff
~30% of outreach time spent finding contacts, cleaning data, switching tools
~50 touchpoints per Tier 1 company across 5+ channels - tracked nowhere
Post-call follow-up fully manual: copy from OneNote, hand-edit, paste to Outlook
Outreach process lives in people's heads - hard to scale or onboard juniors
Signal detection relies on Google Alerts, which misses ~50% of LinkedIn posts
